Tool_professional_tax_Description: State-wise professional tax slabs. Maharashtra, Karnataka, WB, and more.
Tool_professional_tax_Subtitle: State PT on your monthly salary
Tool_professional_tax_LearnText: Professional tax is a state levy deducted from salary in many Indian states. Slabs differ by state, and some states cap the annual amount (often around ₹2,400–₹2,500).
Tool_professional_tax_FormulaNote: Slabs here are illustrative planning figures. February bumps (e.g. Maharashtra) and exemptions can differ — confirm with your payroll / state rules.
Tool_professional_tax_StateHint: Choose the state where you work / are registered.
Tool_professional_tax_CapBody: This state’s annual PT is capped. Estimated yearly tax: {0}.
Tool_professional_tax_ExampleSubtitle: Illustrative MH slab with annual cap
Tool_professional_tax_ExampleStep_4: If a ₹2,500 cap applies, annual stays within the cap.
Tool_professional_tax_ExampleStep_5: Payroll deducts PT from take-home each month.
Tool_professional_tax_Step_2: Match monthly salary to the slab.
Tool_professional_tax_Step_4: Apply annual cap if the state has one.
Tool_professional_tax_Info_Purpose: Estimate monthly and annual professional tax by state.
Tool_professional_tax_Info_WhyKnow: PT is a small but fixed drag on take-home and varies when you change states.
Tool_professional_tax_Info_RealLife: Job offers across cities, payroll checks, freelancers registered in a PT state.
Tool_professional_tax_Info_Differentiati: FinYatra shows multiple state slabs and annual caps in one tool.
Tool_professional_tax_Info_Motto: A small state tax, still worth knowing.
Tool_tds_Description: TDS on salary, rent, property, FD interest. Section-wise rates and thresholds.
Tool_tds_LearnText: TDS is tax withheld when certain payments are made — salary, FD interest, rent, property, professional fees, and more. Each section has its own rate and threshold. Missing PAN often means a higher rate.
Tool_tds_FormulaNote: Rates and thresholds are illustrative for common sections. Always check the latest Income-tax Act / Finance Act notifications.
Tool_tds_AnnualTaxHint: From your tax calculator / Form 16 estimate. Monthly TDS ≈ annual tax ÷ 12.
Tool_tds_SeniorHint: For 194A, interest threshold is often ₹50,000 instead of ₹40,000.
Tool_tds_AmountHint_192: Used to show net after estimated monthly TDS.
Tool_tds_ThresholdKind_none: Salary uses tax estimate, not a flat %
Tool_tds_Status_Below: Amount is within / at the threshold ({0}). No TDS under this simplified rule.
Tool_tds_ScenarioSubtitle: Same amount, with vs without PAN
Tool_tds_ExampleStep_2: Threshold for non-senior ≈ ₹40,000 — amount is above it.
Tool_tds_ExampleStep_5: Without PAN, rate often jumps to 20%.
Tool_tds_Step_4: Subtract TDS to get net payable / receivable.
Tool_tds_Info_Purpose: Estimate TDS under common Income-tax sections.
Tool_tds_Info_WhyKnow: Wrong section or missing PAN can mean excess withholding and refund delays.
Tool_tds_Info_RealLife: FD maturity, paying rent, buying property, hiring contractors.
Tool_tds_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra groups common TDS sections with PAN / threshold checks in one place.
Tool_atal_pension_Description: APY contribution chart by age. Guaranteed ₹1,000–₹5,000/month pension.
Tool_atal_pension_LearnText: Atal Pension Yojana (APY) is a government-backed pension for workers in the unorganised sector (and others who enrol). You contribute monthly until 60 based on your entry age and chosen pension (₹1,000–₹5,000). The pension is guaranteed; a spouse pension option applies on death as per scheme rules.
Tool_atal_pension_FormulaNote: Contributions follow the official APY age–pension chart. Eligibility, co-contribution history, and exit rules are set by PFRDA / government notifications.
Tool_atal_pension_InvalidBody: APY contributions in this chart are for entry ages {0}–{1}.
Tool_atal_pension_SummaryBody: Pay about {0}/month for {1} years to receive {2}/month from age 60 (scheme rules apply).
Tool_atal_pension_Step_3: Read monthly contribution from the chart.
Tool_atal_pension_Step_4: Multiply by months until age 60 for total paid.
Tool_atal_pension_Info_Purpose: Find your APY monthly contribution and lifetime contribution total.
Tool_atal_pension_Info_WhyKnow: Starting younger locks a much lower monthly contribution for the same pension.
Tool_atal_pension_Info_RealLife: Gig workers, small business owners, anyone wanting a guaranteed floor pension.
Tool_atal_pension_Info_Alt_Nps_When: Market-linked retirement with higher expected return.
Tool_atal_pension_Info_Alt_Epf_Cons: Not a fixed monthly pension product.
Tool_atal_pension_Info_Alt_Scss_When: Senior citizens needing quarterly interest income.
Tool_atal_pension_Info_Differentiation: FinYatra uses the age–pension contribution chart and shows total paid until 60.
Tool_atal_pension_Info_Motto: A small monthly habit, a guaranteed floor at 60.
